parameters.name: rayattrib
parameters.label: Ray Attribute
parameters.description: Ray direction attribute.

parameters.name: negateray
parameters.label: Negate Ray
parameters.description: Negates the direction of the ray.

parameters.name: numbounces
parameters.label: Number of Bounces
parameters.description: The number of bounces for the rays.

parameters.name: connectpoints
parameters.label: Connect Points
parameters.description: When doing multiple bounces, for each input point whether to connect the intersections as a line strip.

parameters.name: limitraylength
parameters.label: Limit Ray Length
parameters.description: The ray length will be limited.

parameters.name: trimray
parameters.label: Trim Ray
parameters.description: Option to trim ray line strip.

parameters.name: anyhit
parameters.label: Any Hit
parameters.description: Whether to return the first hit, not guaranteed to be the closest or the farthest one.

parameters.name: hitnormal
parameters.label: Hit Normal
parameters.description: Generate normal attribute at hit locations.

parameters.name: doreflectedray
parameters.label: Reflected Ray
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute containing the reflected ray direction.

parameters.name: dist
parameters.label: Point Intersection Distance
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance between the original point and the intersection with the collision geometry.

parameters.name: farhit
parameters.label: Farthest Hit
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the farthest hit position.

parameters.name: numhits
parameters.label: Number of Hits
parameters.description: The Number of hits for rays passing through all the primitives in the ray direction.

parameters.name: inside
parameters.label: Inside
parameters.description: Outputs an attribute containing 0 for rays stating outside a volume (a closed polygon surface), or 1 for rays originating inside a volume.

parameters.name: hitprimindex
parameters.label: Hit Primitive Index
parameters.description: Generate primitive index at hit locations.

parameters.name: barycoords
parameters.label: Barycentric Coordinates
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the barycentric coordinates of the intersection point.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: Intersection scaling factor.

parameters.name: lift
parameters.label: Lift
parameters.description: This value offsets the point from the collision geometry in the direction of its normal.

parameters.name: hitpointattrscope
parameters.label: Hit Point Attr Scope
parameters.description: Point attributes to sample on the collision geometry.

parameters.name: hitprimattrscope
parameters.label: Hit Primitive Attr Scope
parameters.description: attributes to sample on the collision geometry.

parameters.name: hitvertattrscope
parameters.label: Hit Vertex Attr Scope
parameters.description: attributes to sample on the collision geometry.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
